title: Closed: Public policy - Open work permits for Hong Kong recent graduates - Canada.ca
content:
## Closed: Public policy - Open work permits for recent Hong Kong graduates
As a recent Hong Kong graduate, you may have been eligible to apply for an open work permit under the temporary public policy for Hong Kong residents . The public policy expired on February 7, 2025.
The open work permit is valid for up to 3 years .
Closed to new applicants

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
